name: Why I am getting this error? - Help - Godot Forum
snippet:
Jul 22, 2025 — Line 4: Could not find type “DataTypes” in the current scope . ... class_name which prevents you from using it anywhere than as an Autoload .
If you want to use variables from other scripts, those variables must be static, or you need to set the script as a global autoload singleton. Missing: 4.5 | Show results with: 4.5
